3115310.name: Bloodmoon Survivors
3115310.description:
You are a Lunar Knight of the blood moon, and tonight is your night.  It's time for violence. 

Slay the twisted horrors conjured by moon in this horde survival roguelite. Gain experience, grow stronger, and synergize your weapons to crush the enemy forces and survive the night.

Features

  • Quick, action-packed 20 minute battles as you fight your way to day-break

  • Fight your way through five different biomes, all corrupted by the blood moon: a grave-riddled forest, bloody desert, burning farmstead, molten tundra, and the eldritch dark side of the lunar plane

  • Slay unique bosses that lead their armies from the front.  Each commander has unique attack patterns, spells, and combat prowess

  • Harvest souls of your felled enemies. Gain experience, and level up your weapons with synergistic upgrades to craft unique and powerful builds for each run

  • Master and synergize your arsenal by switching weapons with skill-based swap and dual wield mechanics

  • Seek favor from the blood moon and unlock otherworldly weapons, permanent blessings, and weapon mastery ranks that make your stronger with each victory

Master swapping and dual wielding your weapons to mow down hordes of enemies.

Make heads roll.  Take down punishing bosses with unique combos and abilities.

Combine your powers to discover their deadly, evolved forms.

Full Content List

  • 5 stages with unique enemies and environments

  • 12 different weapons

  • 60 different weapon masteries to empower your weapons

  • 16 blessing that increase your strength with every run

  • Over 100 milestones in-game challenges with unique rewards

  • Dozens of abilities with unique upgrade trees

  • Powerup evolution system that transforms your abilities into unique evolved forms

  • 30+ unique bosses

  • 25+ unique monsters
3115310.supported_languages: 英语, 西班牙语 - 拉丁美洲, 西班牙语 - 西班牙

categories.description: 无需应对快速反应事件
